name: Implement Presigned URL API
description: Develop POST /groups/generate-presigned-urls to enable secure file uploads for document analysis.

name: Develop Document Parsing Logic
description: Integrate logic to parse DOCX and Excel files to extract context for the AI generation engine.

name: Implement AI Sprint Generation API
description: Develop POST /groups/{group_id}/sprints/generation to generate sprint tasks using LLM based on files and additional context.

name: Build Sprint Creation and Upload UI
description: Create frontend form for inputting sprint details, additional context, and handling file uploads.

name: Build Sprint Preview and Edit Screen
description: Develop UI to display AI-generated tasks in a preview mode, allowing users to edit or refine before saving as draft.

name: Implement Task Classification Logic
description: Develop backend logic to categorize tasks into statuses (EARLY, ON_TIME, LATE, SPILLOVER) based on date comparisons.

name: Develop Burndown and Metric Engine
description: Implement calculation logic for daily completion points, total estimated vs. completed points, and burndown chart data.

name: Build Sprint Progress Dashboard
description: Visualize sprint progress using burndown charts and metric cards for completion rates and spillover.

name: Implement Sprint Export API
description: Develop GET /groups/{group_id}/sprints/{sprint_id}/export to generate and download Excel files of the sprint work list.

name: Apply Role-Based Access Control
description: Restrict access to AI generation and export features to users with Owner or Manager roles.
